ATLAS

Designing Intelligent Workflows

Led end-to-end UX design to evolve Atlas from traditional BI dashboards to AI-driven workflows that analyze data and push insights directly to business stakeholders. Designed and shipped production-ready experiences that made complex data easier to understand and act on.
